description_long: This object is a detailed artificial flower arrangement featuring two large, multi-layered blossoms with deep red and orange petals. The petals are densely packed and exhibit a naturalistic gradient from dark red at the base to lighter orange at the tips, giving the flowers a lifelike appearance. The blossoms are supported by twisted, light brown stems that emerge from a small, round, white and black base, which serves as a stand. Some dried, curled leaves are visible near the base, adding to the realism of the arrangement. The petals are arranged in a radial, overlapping pattern, creating a full and voluminous look. The overall structure is compact, making it suitable for display on urban surfaces such as tables, windowsills, or public park installations.
description: A realistic artificial flower arrangement with two large, layered red-orange blossoms and twisted stems on a round base. The petals are densely packed and arranged in a radial, overlapping pattern.
description_view_0: Front view shows the two main blossoms with their vibrant red and orange petals fully visible, and the round base supporting the stems.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the arrangement, showing the layered petals and the twisted stems extending from the base.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back sides of the blossoms and more of the supporting stems and leaves, with the base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizes the overlapping petals and the curvature of the stems, with the base slightly offset.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, radial pattern with multiple overlapping layers, creating a whorled and symmetrical appearance typical of composite flowers.
